Funding_boost can help buy time, but teacher_incentive is a stopgap - let's not tie ourselves to retention bonuses without a plan to fix the underlying issues. resource_realloc is a no-brainer, we're wasting resources the way we are. transparency_report is crucial, the public needs to know what's going on.
